panels.description: Cluster health inferred from primary/secondary counts.

panels.title: Primary
panels.description: Primary member count.

panels.title: Storage
panels.description: Worst disk usage percentage across members.

panels.title: Ready Pods
panels.description: Ready MongoDB pods in the selected namespace.

panels.title: Read
panels.description: Lowest available read tickets.

panels.description: Lowest available write tickets.

panels.title: Mongo
panels.description: MongoDB container restarts.

panels.description: Operator container restarts.

panels.title: Last member start
panels.description: Most recent MongoDB member pod start time.

panels.title: OPS/s
panels.description: Combined operation rate across command/query/write paths.

panels.title: CPU Utilisation
panels.description: CPU utilisation from requests for MongoDB pods.

panels.title: Memory Utilisation
panels.description: Memory utilisation from requests for MongoDB pods.

targets.expr: sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{job="kubelet", metrics_path="/metrics/cadvisor", namespace="$kubeNamespace", container!="", image!="", pod=~"app-mongo-rs-[0-9]+"}) / sum(max by(pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{job="kube-state-metrics", namespace="$kubeNamespace", resource="memory", pod=~"app-mongo-rs-[0-9]+"}))
